commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `startSshPortForward` so its preferred local-port preflight calls `ensurePortAvailable(localPort, "127.0.0.1")`.

PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: scoped `ensurePortAvailable` throws `PortInUseError`, and the current caller catch does not handle that class.
commands.review_followup: - The automerge-opted PR has one narrow mechanical blocker: preserve the existing fallback after the scoped probe surfaces `PortInUseError`.

target.title: fix(infra): pin ensurePortAvailable to 127.0.0.1 in startSshPortForward
target.author: xzh-xydt
